2026/3/26にSubstackに掲載されたUX Tigers創設者 Jakob Nielsen 博士の記事：
[Intent by Discovery: Designing the AI User Experience](https://jakobniels

旧指標（決定論前提）	新指標（確率的前提）
Discoverability	Intent Capture
Error Prevention	Clarification Quality
Time to Learn	Ease of Delegation
Execution Efficiency	Verification Efficiency（Evaluability）
Visibility of System Status	Execution Transparency
User Satisfaction	Trust Calibration
